description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs: build and verify_signatures. Use the custom Docker image registry.gitlab.com/robigalia/runner:latest for the build job, which runs a before_script to execute "git submodule update --init --recursive", "git clone https://gitlab.com/robigalia/sel4-config ../sel4-config" and "git clone --recursive https://gitlab.com/robigalia/sel4 ../sel4", then runs the script steps "pushd ../sel4", "make x86_defconfig", "popd", "xargo build --target i686-sel4-robigalia", "pushd ../sel4", "make x64_qemu_defconfig", "popd", "xargo build --target x86_64-sel4-robigalia", "cp .armtest.config ../sel4/.config", "xargo build --target arm-sel4-robigalia". Use the ubuntu:17.04 image for the verify_signatures job, which runs "apt update", "apt install --assume-yes python-pexpect gnupg2 git", "git clone --depth=1 https://gitlab.com/robigalia/meta", "gpg2 --list-keys", "(gpg2 --export --no-default-keyring --keyring ./meta/.gnupg/pubring.kbx || true) | gpg2 --import", "gpg2 --list-keys --fingerprint --fingerprint --verbose", and "./meta/verify-signatures.py HEAD ./meta/.mailmap". Both jobs run in the default stage, have no caches, artifacts, or special rules.
